Dialog.name: Item_001
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}A key that unlocks the door to the Velvet Room.[n]

Dialog.name: Item_002
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}A fallen leaf from a young tree.[n]

Dialog.name: Item_005
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}A massively multiplayer PC game called Innocent Sin Online.[n]

Dialog.name: Item_006
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}An envelope from Mitsuru to be discretely given to Aragaki.[n]

Dialog.name: Item_007
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}An envelope from Aragaki. It seems he won't return to school.[n]

Dialog.name: Item_008
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}A key that opens the door to the gym.[n]

Dialog.name: Item_009
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}"At the end of a great trial, the answer illuminates my path."[n]

Dialog.name: Item_00A
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}A strip of paper from Takaya, seemingly part of some research material.[n]

Dialog.name: Item_00B
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}A choker Tomochika made. Enables fusion of Futsunushi.[n]

Dialog.name: Item_00C
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}The headphones Fuuka made. Enables fusion of Scathach.[n]

Dialog.name: Item_00D
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}The key to Mitsuru's motorcycle. Enables fusion of Alilat.[n]

Dialog.name: Item_00E
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Proof of Odagiri's trust. Enables fusion of Odin.[n]

Dialog.name: Item_00F
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Fruit from Bunkichi's son's tree. Enables fusion of Kohryu.[n]

Dialog.name: Item_010
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Yukari's treasured cell phone strap. Enables fusion of Cybele.[n]

Dialog.name: Item_011
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}A roll of sports tape from Miyamoto. Enables fusion of Thor.[n]

Dialog.name: Item_012
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}A manga by Chihiro's favorite artist. Enables fusion of Melchizedek.[n]

Dialog.name: Item_013
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}The message Maya left in the MMORPG. Enables fusion of Arahabaki.[n]

Dialog.name: Item_014
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Notification of Hiraga's prize. Enables fusion of Lakshmi.[n]

Dialog.name: Item_015
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}A letter from the kids Yuko trained. Enables fusion of Atavaka.[n]

Dialog.name: Item_016
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}The ring Maiko made. Enables fusion of Attis.[n]

Dialog.name: Item_017
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}The pouch Bebe made. Enables fusion of Yurlungur.[n]

Dialog.name: Item_018
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}The letter President Tanaka received. Enables fusion of Beelzebub.[n]

Dialog.name: Item_019
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Mutatsu's bottle tag. Enables fusion of Chi You.[n]

Dialog.name: Item_01A
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}A car key received from Hayase. Enables fusion of Helel.[n]

Dialog.name: Item_01B
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}A license received from Suemitsu. Enables fusion of Sandalphon.[n]

Dialog.name: Item_01C
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}A notebook containing Kamiki's story. Enables fusion of Asura.[n]

Dialog.name: Item_01D
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}A broken component from Aigis's body. Enables fusion of Metatron.[n]

Dialog.name: Item_021
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Enables fusion of the Hermit Persona, Mothman.[n]

Dialog.name: Item_022
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Enables fusion of the Emperor Persona, King Frost.[n]

Dialog.name: Item_023
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Enables fusion of the Fool Persona, Decarabia.[n]

Dialog.name: Item_024
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Enables fusion of the Hermit Persona, Nebiros.[n]

Dialog.name: Item_025
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Enables fusion of the Devil Persona, Lilith.[n]

Dialog.name: Item_026
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Enables fusion of the Tower Persona, Masakado.[n]

Dialog.name: Item_027
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Enables fusion of the Magician Persona, Hua Po.[n]

Dialog.name: Item_028
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Enables fusion of the Hierophant Persona, Thoth.[n]

Dialog.name: Item_029
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Enables fusion of the Judgement Persona, Lucifer.[n]

Dialog.name: Item_02A
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Enables fusion of the Sun Persona, Houou.[n]

Dialog.name: Item_02C
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Enables fusion of the Fool Persona, Orpheus Telos.[n]

Dialog.name: Item_035
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}A classified document from ten years ago, found in Tartarus.[n]

Dialog.name: Item_036
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}A classified document from ten years ago, found in Tartarus.[n]

Dialog.name: Item_037
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}A classified document from ten years ago, found in Tartarus.[n]

Dialog.name: Item_038
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}A classified document from ten years ago, found in Tartarus.[n]

Dialog.name: Item_039
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}A classified document from ten years ago, found in Tartarus.[n]

Dialog.name: Item_03A
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}A classified document from ten years ago, found in Tartarus.[n]

Dialog.name: Item_03B
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}A classified document from ten years ago, found in Tartarus.[n]

Dialog.name: Item_03C
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}A classified document from ten years ago, found in Tartarus.[n]

Dialog.name: Item_03E
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}A memoir written by a researcher, found in Monad.[n]

Dialog.name: Item_03F
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}A memoir written by a researcher, found in Monad.[n]

Dialog.name: Item_040
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}A memoir written by a researcher, found in Monad.[n]

Dialog.name: Item_041
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}A memoir written by a researcher, found in Monad.[n]

Dialog.name: Item_042
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}A memoir written by a researcher, found in Monad.[n]

Dialog.name: Item_043
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}A memoir written by a researcher, found in Monad.[n]

Dialog.name: Item_044
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Hand powder used in archery. Looks like roasted soybean powder.[n]

Dialog.name: Item_045
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}A slender sword with a triangular cross section that is hard to bend.[n]

Dialog.name: Item_046
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Has traces of having wiped a variety of things other than glasses.[n]

Dialog.name: Item_047
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}A plant with red leaves. Sometimes called a "Christmas star."[n]

Dialog.name: Item_048
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Has a game called Odin Cube inserted in it.[n]

Dialog.name: Item_04A
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}A figure of a popular hero with 40 individually moveable joints.[n]

Dialog.name: Item_04C
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Expensive dog food. Can also be used to feed wolves and tigers.[n]

Dialog.name: Item_04F
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}A discarded human anatomic model. It's eerily realistic.[n]

Dialog.name: Item_050
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Non-alcoholic, but provides a small taste of being adult.[n]

Dialog.name: Item_051
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}A mahjong tile from the mahjong parlor. It has a drawing of a bird on it.[n]

Dialog.name: Item_052
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Inari sushi received from an old woman.[n]

Dialog.name: Item_053
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Replica of a Sengoku-era helm. It has the symbol for "love" on it.[n]

Dialog.name: Item_054
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}A CD recording of Gekkoukan Boogie. Comes with a lyrics card.[n]

Dialog.name: Item_055
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}A business card signed by the president of Tanaka's Amazing Commodities.[n]

Dialog.name: Item_056
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}An old 500-yen bill. Seems to still be useable.[n]

Dialog.name: Item_057
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}A seashell found in Yakushima. Emits the sounds of distant waves.[n]

Dialog.name: Item_058
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Seaweed picked up in Yakushima. It smells intensely of the sea.[n]

Dialog.name: Item_059
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Driftwood from Yakushima. Has a unique shape, due to erosion.[n]

Dialog.name: Item_05A
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}A crab found in Yakushima. Moves quickly in dark places.[n]

Dialog.name: Item_05B
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}A cloth used for treating injuries. There may be someone who needs this.[n]

Dialog.name: Item_05C
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}A Gekkoukan student handbook. Should be returned to its owner.[n]

Dialog.name: Item_05D
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}One touch and they can't resist! For those wishing to befriend cats.[n]

Dialog.name: Item_05E
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}A thank-you letter regarding the rescue of a missing person.[n]

Dialog.name: Item_05F
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}A Christmas present from a self-proclaimed Santa. Wrapped neatly.[n]

Dialog.name: Item_060
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}The Aohige Pharmacy owner's prized aojiru. Bitter yet sweet.[n]

Dialog.name: Item_062
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}A baseball glove gifted from Junpei. Enables fusion of Surt.[n]

Dialog.name: Item_063
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Proof of recognition by Sanada. Enables fusion of Horus.[n]

Dialog.name: Item_064
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}A collar attached with a protective charm. Enables fusion of Byakko.[n]

Dialog.name: Item_065
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Amada's commemoratory key. Enables fusion of Michael.[n]

Dialog.name: Item_066
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Proof Aragaki thought about his future. Enables fusion of Hell Biker.[n]

Dialog.name: Item_067
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}A music box that Ryoji left behind. Enables fusion of Saturnus.[n]

Dialog.name: Item_06E
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}The Fool card will appear during Shuffle Time.[n]

Dialog.name: Item_06F
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}The Magician card will appear during Shuffle Time.[n]

Dialog.name: Item_070
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}The High Priestess card will appear during Shuffle Time.[n]

Dialog.name: Item_071
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}The Empress card will appear during Shuffle Time.[n]

Dialog.name: Item_072
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}The Emperor card will appear during Shuffle Time.[n]

Dialog.name: Item_073
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}The Hierophant card will appear during Shuffle Time.[n]

Dialog.name: Item_074
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}The Lovers card will appear during Shuffle Time.[n]

Dialog.name: Item_075
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}The Chariot card will appear during Shuffle Time.[n]

Dialog.name: Item_076
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}The Justice card will appear during Shuffle Time.[n]

Dialog.name: Item_077
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}The Hermit card will appear during Shuffle Time.[n]

Dialog.name: Item_078
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}The Fortune card will appear during Shuffle Time.[n]

Dialog.name: Item_079
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}The Strength card will appear during Shuffle Time.[n]

Dialog.name: Item_07A
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}The Hanged Man card will appear during Shuffle Time.[n]

Dialog.name: Item_082
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}The Temperance card will appear during Shuffle Time.[n]

Dialog.name: Item_083
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}The Devil card will appear during Shuffle Time.[n]

Dialog.name: Item_084
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}The Tower card will appear during Shuffle Time.[n]

Dialog.name: Item_085
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}The Star card will appear during Shuffle Time.[n]

Dialog.name: Item_086
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}The Moon card will appear during Shuffle Time.[n]

Dialog.name: Item_087
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}The Sun card will appear during Shuffle Time.[n]

Dialog.name: Item_088
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}The Judgement card will appear during Shuffle Time.[n]

Dialog.name: Item_08C
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}The number of Major Arcana cards attainable in 1 expedition increases by 1.[n]

Dialog.name: Item_08D
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}The number of Major Arcana cards attainable in 1 expedition increases by 1.[n]

Dialog.name: Item_08E
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}The number of Major Arcana cards attainable in 1 expedition increases by 1.[n]

Dialog.name: Item_08F
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}The number of Major Arcana cards attainable in 1 expedition increases by 1.[n]

Dialog.name: Item_090
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}The number of Major Arcana cards attainable in 1 expedition increases by 1.[n]

Dialog.name: Item_091
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}The number of Major Arcana cards attainable in 1 expedition increases by 1.[n]

Dialog.name: Item_092
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}The number of Major Arcana cards attainable in 1 expedition increases by 1.[n]

Dialog.name: Item_093
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}The number of Major Arcana cards attainable in 1 expedition increases by 1.[n]

Dialog.name: Item_0A0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Brand-name, black-[n]rimmed glasses that give off an air of intelligence.[n]

Dialog.name: Item_0A1
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}A headband with cat ears that can make anybody cute.[n]

Dialog.name: Item_0A2
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Silly glasses with a fake nose attached that are sure to get a laugh.[n]

Dialog.name: Item_0A3
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}A pointed, red hat that feels like Christmas. For Santas in training.[n]

Dialog.name: Item_0AA
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}A crystal shaped like a butterfly. It emits a faint, pulsating light.[n]

Dialog.name: Item_0AB
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}The key that unlocks the doors that lead outside.[n]

Dialog.name: Item_0AC
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}When all eight are united, they are barred by no door.[n]

Dialog.name: Item_0AD
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}A flyer for a new branch of Rafflesia. "Free gift for our grand opening!"[n]

Dialog.name: Item_0AE
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}The mark of having carried over one's story.[n]
